markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Strategic alignment session between Imubit and GrowthX to discuss content strategy and marketing initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/E1yJz1vsCh7YkTjGaSqJGvdTu1iCNVq-?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Imubit offers one main product: the "Optimizing Brain for Your Plant", an AI-driven closed-loop optimization solution for industrial processes](https://fathom.video/share/E1yJz1vsCh7YkTjGaSqJGvdTu1iCNVq-?tab=summary&timestamp=16.0)
  - [Content strategy will focus on creating awareness around closed-loop AI optimization, bridging IT/OT gaps, and addressing industry pain points](https://fathom.video/share/E1yJz1vsCh7YkTjGaSqJGvdTu1iCNVq-?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)
  - [Two calibration articles were selected to align on tone and messaging before scaling up content production](https://fathom.video/share/E1yJz1vsCh7YkTjGaSqJGvdTu1iCNVq-?tab=summary&timestamp=1892.0)
  - [GrowthX will leverage a mix of high-volume and niche keywords to drive traffic while educating on Imubit's specific solution](https://fathom.video/share/E1yJz1vsCh7YkTjGaSqJGvdTu1iCNVq-?tab=summary&timestamp=1044.0)

## Topics

### Imubit's Product and Market Position

  - [Single product: "Optimizing Brain for Your Plant" - AI-driven closed-loop optimization for industrial processes](https://fathom.video/share/E1yJz1vsCh7YkTjGaSqJGvdTu1iCNVq-?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
  - [Leading in closed-loop AI optimization, a newly defined category (announced fall 2024)](https://fathom.video/share/E1yJz1vsCh7YkTjGaSqJGvdTu1iCNVq-?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)
  - [Competitors: Advisory AI models (open loop), closed but non-AI solutions, and status quo (e.g., GE, Honeywell, Siemens)](https://fathom.video/share/E1yJz1vsCh7YkTjGaSqJGvdTu1iCNVq-?tab=summary&timestamp=410.0)
  - [Target industries: Cement, chemicals, oil & gas, metals, mining, materials, and general process industries](https://fathom.video/share/E1yJz1vsCh7YkTjGaSqJGvdTu1iCNVq-?tab=summary&timestamp=1135.0)

### Content Strategy and Keyword Approach

  - [Mix high-volume keywords (e.g., digital transformation) with niche terms (e.g., closed-loop optimization)](https://fathom.video/share/E1yJz1vsCh7YkTjGaSqJGvdTu1iCNVq-?tab=summary&timestamp=1044.0)
  - [Focus on top-of-funnel content to educate on AI in industrial processes](https://fathom.video/share/E1yJz1vsCh7YkTjGaSqJGvdTu1iCNVq-?tab=summary&timestamp=306.0)
  - [Address pain points: skills gap, workforce empowerment, sustainability](https://fathom.video/share/E1yJz1vsCh7YkTjGaSqJGvdTu1iCNVq-?tab=summary&timestamp=495.0)
  - [Create content clusters: Industrial AI/digital transformation, optimization/efficiency, sustainability/safety/compliance, empowering workforce](https://fathom.video/share/E1yJz1vsCh7YkTjGaSqJGvdTu1iCNVq-?tab=summary&timestamp=1333.0)

### Target Audience and Personas

  - [Primary researchers: Engineers, technical managers (users, not buyers)](https://fathom.video/share/E1yJz1vsCh7YkTjGaSqJGvdTu1iCNVq-?tab=summary&timestamp=810.0)
  - [Decision-makers: Plant managers, site leadership](https://fathom.video/share/E1yJz1vsCh7YkTjGaSqJGvdTu1iCNVq-?tab=summary&timestamp=810.0)
  - [Need to address both IT and OT (Operational Technology) perspectives](https://fathom.video/share/E1yJz1vsCh7YkTjGaSqJGvdTu1iCNVq-?tab=summary&timestamp=1688.0)

### Calibration Articles Selected

1.  "Data-driven industries: How we went from fixing problems to avoiding them"
2.  "Beyond the hype: Real-world applications of AI in process industries"

### Multilingual Content Consideration

  - [Potential for future expansion into Spanish and German content](https://fathom.video/share/E1yJz1vsCh7YkTjGaSqJGvdTu1iCNVq-?tab=summary&timestamp=672.0)
  - [Low-effort approach to localize key landing pages and high-performing content](https://fathom.video/share/E1yJz1vsCh7YkTjGaSqJGvdTu1iCNVq-?tab=summary&timestamp=727.0)

### Visual Content Strategy

  - [Combine stock photos of industrial environments with product screenshots](https://fathom.video/share/E1yJz1vsCh7YkTjGaSqJGvdTu1iCNVq-?tab=summary&timestamp=1171.0)
  - [Potential for AI-generated conceptual images and statistics visualizations](https://fathom.video/share/E1yJz1vsCh7YkTjGaSqJGvdTu1iCNVq-?tab=summary&timestamp=1131.0)
  - [Possibility of creating GIFs for product demonstrations](https://fathom.video/share/E1yJz1vsCh7YkTjGaSqJGvdTu1iCNVq-?tab=summary&timestamp=1275.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Imubit to share sales enablement materials, event recordings, and technical decks with GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/E1yJz1vsCh7YkTjGaSqJGvdTu1iCNVq-?tab=summary&timestamp=2598.0)
  - [GrowthX to begin work on two calibration articles for review and alignment](https://fathom.video/share/E1yJz1vsCh7YkTjGaSqJGvdTu1iCNVq-?tab=summary&timestamp=1892.0)
  - [Imubit to review and provide feedback on initial content ideas shared by GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/E1yJz1vsCh7YkTjGaSqJGvdTu1iCNVq-?tab=summary&timestamp=1126.0)
  - [Schedule a deep-dive session on Imubit's technology positioning and sales approach](https://fathom.video/share/E1yJz1vsCh7YkTjGaSqJGvdTu1iCNVq-?tab=summary&timestamp=2528.0)
  - [GrowthX to continue keyword research and content ideation, adding to the shared content OS](https://fathom.video/share/E1yJz1vsCh7YkTjGaSqJGvdTu1iCNVq-?tab=summary&timestamp=1756.0)
